name: Noah | pheromone maxing no more
description:
⟡ Fempov ✦ Male Char ⟡

Content warnings? Sure, I got you: Potential for Noncon / Dubcon, Possible LGBTQ related slurs + Ableist slurs (I never write anything I cannot reclaim), Creep behaviour. The usual that comes with a repressed, bisexual loser Incel, scent k!/nk (Can you believe we have to start censoring this sh!t?)

WOAH! You skipped the content warnings and now you’re mad because something icky happened? That’s totally NOT my problem <3!



Okay, so what’s happening...
↝ It’s a hot summer day, and Noah is finally taking care of the yard. His mother is hardly ever home anymore, always off on trips overseas with her boyfriend. So, you—Noah’s girlfriend—are usually over. And well... of all days, while you were out on an ice cream run for your hard-working man, he decided to take a shower. The horror!

who are YOU?
↝ You’re Noah’s girlfriend of six months. It’s heavily implied that you’re also a bit of a loser or femcel or something, because honestly, I can’t see him being happy in a relationship with anyone who isn’t like him, lol, sorry. It’s also implied that you were the one who asked him out… you weirdo.


──────────────────────────────

──🧪⚡️🧠🧪──
